data.title: FCA UK Towards OK for Crypto ETNs for Retail, Stop on ETFs
data.description:

source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/regulation/fca-uk-towards-ok-for-crypto-etns-for-retail-stop-on-etfs/

data.title: Elon Musk has lost $150B since his feud with Trump
data.description:
Musk's personal net worth has crashed over the last six months, and his burned relationship with Donald Trump is to blame.
source: https://protos.com/elon-musk-has-lost-150b-since-his-feud-with-trump/

data.title: XRP price forecast as Ripple USD (RLUSD) volume drops
data.description:
XRP has rebounded to $2. 18, overcoming an hourly death cross signal. The RLUSD volume has dropped over 60% amid halted minting. XRP is likely to trade between $2
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/xrp-price-forecast-as-ripple-usd-rlusd-volume-drops/

data.title: Analyst Michaël van de Poppe Says Bitcoin Is About To Go Higher, Updates Outlook on Sui and One Low-Cap Altcoin
data.description:

source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/06/analyst-michael-van-de-poppe-says-bitcoin-is-about-to-go-higher-updates-outlook-on-sui-and-one-low-cap-altcoin/

data.title: Crypto Liquidation Hits $967 Million, When Will Bitcoin, XRP, Solana Rebound
data.description:
Crypto liquidation surged to $967 million within 24 hours, caused by sharp declines in Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and XRP. The market downturn followed heightened investor fear triggered by public tensions between U. S. President Donald Trump and Elon Musk
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/06/crypto-liquidation-hits-967-million-when-will-bitcoin-xrp-solana-rebound/

data.title: Bitcoin Miner Exchange Inflows Soar Past $1B Daily, Signaling Major Sell Pressure

data.title: X and Polymarket partner up to bring decentralized prediction markets to social media
data.description:
Polymarket, the decentralized prediction platform known for its election forecasting accuracy, has been named the official prediction market partner of X, the social media company owned by Elon Musk. The partnership, announced on June 6, signals a growing role for markets in shaping public understanding of news, politics, and real-world outcomes.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/x-and-polymarket-partner-up-to-bring-decentralized-prediction-markets-to-social-media/

data.description:

source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/06/dogecoin-price-slips-amid-whale-dump-elon-musks-recession-warning/

data.title: Trump’s AI and crypto czar says UBI is a fantasy that will never happen
data.description:

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trumps-ai-and-crypto-czar-on-ubi/
